---
name: New Skill Proposal
about: Propose a new ethical skill domain
title: "[Proposal] New skill: "
labels: proposal, new-skill
---

## Proposed Skill Name
What would this skill be called?

## Purpose
What ethical concern does this skill address? Why is it needed?

## Scope
What specific behaviors would this skill guide? What would it NOT cover?

## Justification
- Why can't existing skills cover this need?
- What deployment contexts would use this skill?
- What harm does this skill help prevent?

## Core Principles (Draft)
List 3-5 core principles the skill would establish.

## Tradeoffs
What tradeoffs or tensions does this skill create with existing skills?

## Misuse Risks
How could this skill be misused? What mitigations would you propose?

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I am willing to draft the full skill (SKILL.md, EXAMPLES.md, TEST_CASES.md, MISUSE.md)
- [ ] I would like help from maintainers to develop this skill
- [ ] I am proposing this for others to develop
